Welcome

SacramentoCityPowerwashing

SacramentoCityPowerwashing has been serving Sacramento and the surrounding region with premium power washing services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Sacramento Trusts SacramentoCityPowerwashing

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
Work With Us →

What We Do

Our Services

Driveway Cleaning

Driveways are notorious for accumulating oil stains, dirt, and grime. Over time, these stains can become deeply embedded...

Deck & Patio Cleaning

Decks and patios are great for enjoying Sacramento's beautiful weather, but they can quickly become dirty and stained. M...

Fence Cleaning

Fences are exposed to the elements year-round, and they can quickly become dirty and stained. Algae, mildew, and dirt ca...

Gutter Cleaning

Clogged gutters can cause serious water damage to your home. When gutters are full of leaves, debris, and dirt, they can...

Commercial Power Washing

First impressions matter, and a clean exterior can make a big difference in how customers perceive your business. Our co...

SacramentoCityPowerwashing did an amazing job on my house! It was covered in algae and dirt, and now it looks brand new. They were professional, efficient, and reasonably priced. Highly recommend!
